interpretation: The frozen nuisance-matching support gate failed, leaving the participant-level primary contrast, precision, and heterogeneity not estimable at the preregistered support level. This is an uninformative development result, not evidence of absent true grounding.
passing_result_would_eventually_permit: After separate locked confirmation and separate authorization, simulation calibrated to the measured ChildLens ages-3-to-5 distribution could use these identical instruments and learner to estimate lift from synchronized training-only physical side cues.
passing_result_would_not_establish: authorization to generate simulator episodes or train side-cue arms
